comment: Airwindows TapeHack port. Drive into 11th-order Taylor sin, then output trim. Stateless, audibly aggressive.

params.name: Drive
params.comment: params[5]. Wet/dry blend AND preamp boost combined. 0 = bit-perfect dry, 100 = pure saturated polynomial at 3x preamp. Default 0 so the user starts clean and dials drive in.

params.name: Output
params.comment: params[6]. Output trim 0..0.9x. Default 100 = unity (~0.9x) so drive=0 with output=100 is true passthrough loudness.
